message:
Add structured metadata rendering to changelog entries

Refactor changelog sync script to parse JSON data instead of
markdown notes, enabling structured metadata (authors, PRs,
components) to be extracted and rendered. Rewrite LinkCard
component to support meta text and badges array. Apply Tenzir
design tokens to all styling, including --tnz-control-size-sm
for badge heights and proper flexbox alignment.

Renames data variable to changelog to avoid shadowing.
